---
title: "Caroline Young"
---

## Caroline Young

**Dates:** (b.1816/17-after 1871 census)

**Maiden name:** (Coxwell)

### Description

first cousin and ward of Charlotte Keble

### Biography

She married (20 Oct 1839) Rev. Peter Young. They had children James 7, John 5, William 4, Mary 2 and Elizabeth 1 in 1851 census; in 1871 George Edward 19 Frederick Coxwell 8, Mary Jane 22, Elizabeth Ann 21, Charlotte Lucy 17; in 1881 Mary Jane 32 and Charlotte L 27;  the last two still living with their father in Lincoln in 1901. [<i>Recollections of the Rev. Peter Young, M.A., late Rector of North Witham, Lincolnshire and Canon of Lincoln</i>, edited by his daughter (Grimsby: Albert Gait 1903), a pamphlet in London Library]

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 24th [1846[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from [<i>c</i>. 21 October 1839]
- Letter from 25 September 1838

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
